steps.t: Mithrandir has come down out of the city to speak with you.
Pass through the gates and make your way up through Minas Tirith to the Houses of Healing without being seen by Knowing Scholars who might see through…
Prince Imrahil of Dol Amroth is outside the Houses of Healing.
You have entered the Houses of Healing at the behest of Mithrandir.
Faramir is in the south-eastern sick-room of the Houses of Healing.
Éowyn is lying in a bed two rooms to the north of Faramir's room in the Houses of Healing.
Merry is in the north-western room of the Houses of Healing.
Ioreth might know where you can find some athelas.
Ioreth has never heard of athelas. Could it be she would know it by another name?
Mithrandir is in the Houses of Healing.
